title: Xuan Bao
content:
Xuan Bao
 is an elder of the 
Cultivation Alliance
 of the 
Alliance Star System
 and the Great Elder of the Xuan Palace.

Contents

1

Appearance

2

Background

3

History

4

Links and References

Appearance
[
]

He is slightly thin and wears white but this makes him seems like a celestial. His eyes are bright and seemed to be filled with endless depth. He gives off an air of a refined elderly scholar.

Background
[
]

He is a celestial from the 
Rain Celestial Realm
 and the junior-disciple-brother of 
Tian Bao
, the creator of the God-Slaying War Chariot.

History
[
]

Xuan Bao appeared during the war between the Alliance and 
Allheaven Star System
 after the death of 
Ji Xiantian
. He, singlehandedly, offset the disadvantageous position of the Alliance army by severely wounding the Moongazer Serpent.
